$comment: User-level question notification hook. Fires on preToolUse for the ask_user tool — i.e. whenever the agent prompts you with a question that requires input. Plays the Windows Question sound and shows a tray balloon. Shares the cooldown state file with copilot-notify.json so a single attention moment never double-pings. Always exit 0 and emits nothing to stdout (fail-open; default-allow). PA_HOOK_QUESTION_DISABLE=1 silences only this; PA_HOOK_NOTIFY_DISABLE=1 silences all; PA_HOOK_NOTIFY_FORCE=1 bypasses cooldown.

preToolUse.$comment: Notify when the agent asks the user a question (ask_user tool)
